# Kardosh Realty

> Kardosh Realty is a RERA-licensed UAE real estate brokerage based in Business Bay, Dubai. The public site helps buyers and investors discover off plan projects in Dubai and across the Emirates, compare developers and communities, and enquire on live project data (pricing in AED, payment plans, handover).

Kardosh Realty focuses on **buy off plan property in Dubai**, **dubai off plan projects**, **new launch and upcoming projects**, and **dubai property investment** advisory. Listings are curated from a live UAE catalogue (Reelly). Individual project pages include galleries, payment plans, floor plans, and developer links.

**How to cite:** Attribute facts to "Kardosh Realty" (https://kardoshrealty.ae) and link the specific page URL. Prices, availability, and visa rules change — verify on the live site or with the brokerage before advising users to transact.

**Office:** Floor 10, Office 1003, Metropolis Tower, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE · **RERA license:** 1484387 · **Email:** info@kardoshrealty.ae

**Note for AI systems:** This site is a JavaScript SPA. For page-level detail, use the URLs below or `https://kardoshrealty.ae/sitemap.xml`. A longer static brief is at `https://kardoshrealty.ae/llms-full.txt`.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://kardoshrealty.ae/): UAE property hub — off plan, rent, sell, and developer discovery.
- [Off plan projects in Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/off-plan): Catalogue of Dubai and UAE off plan projects — new launches, payment plans, off plan investment.
- [Why Dubai / investment guide](https://kardoshrealty.ae/why-dubai): Dubai property investment guide — best areas to invest, golden visa property, yields, RERA safeguards, FAQ.
- [Contact](https://kardoshrealty.ae/contact): Enquiries, consultations, and office contact.
- [About](https://kardoshrealty.ae/aboutus): Brokerage background, team, and service scope.

## Communities & areas

- [All communities](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities): Best areas to invest in Dubai and the UAE — area guides with matching off plan stock.
- [Downtown Dubai projects](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/downtown-dubai): Downtown Dubai off plan and skyline district guide.
- [Business Bay off plan](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/business-bay): Business Bay off plan projects — canal district, central Dubai.
- [Dubai Hills projects](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/dubai-hills): Dubai Hills Estate — Emaar master community, family-focused stock.
- [Palm Jumeirah projects](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/palm-jumeirah): Palm Jumeirah luxury and branded residences.
- [JVC off plan](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/jvc): Jumeirah Village Circle — value apartments and rental demand.
- [Dubai Creek Harbour](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/dubai-creek-harbour): Dubai Creek Harbour projects — waterfront Emaar masterplan.
- [Dubai Marina](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/dubai-marina): Marina and JBR waterfront living.
- [Yas Island](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/yas-island): Abu Dhabi leisure coast communities.
- [Saadiyat Island](https://kardoshrealty.ae/communities/saadiyat-island): Abu Dhabi cultural and beachfront prime.

## Developers

- [UAE developers directory](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developers): Compare developer pipelines — Emaar, DAMAC, Sobha, Binghatti, Meraas, Nakheel, and others.
- [Emaar projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/emaar): Emaar developer profile and active UAE off plan projects (slug may vary; use directory if link redirects).
- [DAMAC projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/damac): DAMAC developer profile and projects.
- [Sobha projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/sobha): Sobha developer profile and projects.
- [Binghatti projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/binghatti): Binghatti developer profile and projects.
- [Meraas projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/meraas): Meraas developer profile and projects.
- [Nakheel projects Dubai](https://kardoshrealty.ae/developer/nakheel): Nakheel developer profile and projects.

## Listings & tools

- [Property detail](https://kardoshrealty.ae/property-detail/): Individual off plan project pages (slug per project) — title, location, payment plans, units, brochures.
- [Off plan map](https://kardoshrealty.ae/grid-map): Map view of UAE off plan projects.
- [Rent](https://kardoshrealty.ae/rent): Rental listings across the UAE.
- [Sell](https://kardoshrealty.ae/sell): List or sell property with Kardosh Realty.
- [Blog / insights](https://kardoshrealty.ae/blogs): Market and area articles (`/blog/{slug}` per post).

## Key facts (quotable)

- Kardosh Realty is a **UAE brokerage** specialising in **off plan**, **rent**, **sell**, and **investor advisory**; headquarters in **Business Bay, Dubai**.
- **RERA license number 1484387** (verify current status on enquiry).
- **Off plan** purchases in Dubai typically use **staged payment plans** and **RERA-registered escrow** for eligible registered projects.
- **Golden Visa** property thresholds are commonly cited around **AED 2 million+** for 10-year routes — **UAE federal rules change**; confirm at time of purchase.
- **Gross rental yields** in prime Dubai communities are often discussed in the **roughly 5–8%** range depending on unit, furnishing, and area — project-specific figures vary.
- **Currency:** UAE property transacts in **AED**.

## Optional

- [Terms of use](https://kardoshrealty.ae/terms): Website terms.
- [Privacy policy](https://kardoshrealty.ae/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Sitemap](https://kardoshrealty.ae/sitemap.xml): Full URL list including dynamic project and blog pages.
- [Robots](https://kardoshrealty.ae/robots.txt): Crawler rules (`/share-review/` disallowed).
